column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Grasping a katana hilt with white knuckles" | TEXT="覚悟はできております" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the target with sharp, intense eyes" | TEXT="精進いたします" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Standing tall against a strong storm wind" | TEXT="一歩も引きませんわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Cutting a strand of her hair with a knife" | TEXT="退路は断ちました" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Climbing a steep mountain peak alone" | TEXT="成し遂げてみせます" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Writing a vow in red ink with focus" | TEXT="不退転の決意" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Facing a large army with a calm, ready pose" | TEXT="ここが死に場所" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Tying a headband (hachimaki) firmly" | TEXT="覚醒の時ですわ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at her reflection with a cold fire in eyes" | TEXT="己に打ち勝つのみ"
